collections.name: leads
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX `idx_leads_phone_company` ON `leads` (phone, company_id) WHERE phone != ''

collections.name: pv_hsp_data
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_pv_hsp_data_city_state ON pv_hsp_data (city, state)

collections.name: pv_utilities
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_pv_utilities_unique_name ON pv_utilities (company_id, name)

collections.name: pv_efficiency_rules
indexes: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX idx_pv_efficiency_rules_company ON pv_efficiency_rules (company_id)
